channel.title: BCD-watch: New Baselines Report (weekly)
channel.description: A feed that summarizes changes to BCD weekly

item.title: BCD New Universal Implementations Report, Mon Mar 23 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new Baseline items in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 16 March 2026 through Monday, 23 March 2026🔗

21 new universal implementations

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box ➞ auto
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box ➞ none
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box ➞ normal
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box ➞ text
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box ➞ trim-both
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box ➞ trim-end
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box ➞ trim-start
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box-edge
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box-edge ➞ auto
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  11. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box-edge ➞ text
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  12. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box-trim
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  13. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box-trim ➞ none
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  14. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box-trim ➞ trim-both
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  15. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box-trim ➞ trim-end
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  16. css ➞ properties ➞ text-box-trim ➞ trim-start
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  17. css ➞ types ➞ text-edge
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  18. css ➞ types ➞ text-edge ➞ alphabetic
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  19. css ➞ types ➞ text-edge ➞ cap
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  20. css ➞ types ➞ text-edge ➞ ex
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  21. css ➞ types ➞ text-edge ➞ text
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  • Previous report: Monday, 16 March 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.7 (Friday, 13 March 2026) and v7.3.8 (Friday, 20 March 2026)

item.title: BCD New Universal Implementations Report, Mon Mar 16 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new Baseline items in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 9 March 2026 through Monday, 16 March 2026🔗

17 new universal implementations

API

  1. api ➞ CSPViolationReportBody ➞ blockedURL (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ CSPViolationReportBody ➞ columnNumber (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ CSPViolationReportBody ➞ disposition (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ CSPViolationReportBody ➞ documentURL (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ CSPViolationReportBody ➞ effectiveDirective (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ CSPViolationReportBody ➞ lineNumber (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ CSPViolationReportBody ➞ originalPolicy (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ CSPViolationReportBody ➞ referrer (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ CSPViolationReportBody ➞ sample (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ CSPViolationReportBody ➞ sourceFile (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ CSPViolationReportBody ➞ statusCode (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ CSPViolationReportBody ➞ toJSON (⚠️ deprecated)
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ CSSNumericValue ➞ to
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  14. api ➞ ReportingObserver ➞ ReportingObserver ➞ options_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  15. api ➞ ReportingObserver ➞ ReportingObserver ➞ options_parameter ➞ types_property
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  16. api ➞ ReportingObserver ➞ ReportingObserver ➞ options_parameter ➞ types_property ➞ csp-violation
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

JAVASCRIPT

  1. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Math ➞ sumPrecise
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  • Previous report: Monday, 9 March 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.6 (Friday, 6 March 2026) and v7.3.7 (Friday, 13 March 2026)

item.title: BCD New Universal Implementations Report, Mon Mar 09 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new Baseline items in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 2 March 2026 through Monday, 9 March 2026🔗

1 new universal implementation

API

  1. api ➞ HTMLInputElement ➞ showPicker ➞ datalist_input
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  • Previous report: Monday, 2 March 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.5 (Friday, 27 February 2026) and v7.3.6 (Friday, 6 March 2026)

item.title: BCD New Universal Implementations Report, Mon Mar 02 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new Baseline items in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 23 February 2026 through Monday, 2 March 2026🔗

8 new universal implementations

API

  1. api ➞ PopStateEvent ➞ hasUAVisualTransition
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ createImageBitmap ➞ options_resizeQuality_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ alignment-baseline
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ alignment-baseline ➞ baseline
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ alignment-baseline ➞ middle
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ baseline-shift
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ baseline-shift ➞ sub
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ baseline-shift ➞ super
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  • Previous report: Monday, 23 February 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.3 (Friday, 20 February 2026) and v7.3.5 (Friday, 27 February 2026)

item.title: BCD New Universal Implementations Report, Mon Feb 23 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new Baseline items in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 16 February 2026 through Monday, 23 February 2026🔗

25 new universal implementations

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ currentCSSZoom
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ ReadableByteStreamController
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ ReadableByteStreamController ➞ byobRequest
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ ReadableByteStreamController ➞ close
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ ReadableByteStreamController ➞ desiredSize
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ ReadableByteStreamController ➞ enqueue
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ ReadableByteStreamController ➞ error
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ ReadableStream ➞ @@asyncIterator
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ ReadableStreamBYOBReader ➞ ReadableStreamBYOBReader
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ ReadableStreamBYOBReader
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ ReadableStreamBYOBReader ➞ cancel
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ ReadableStreamBYOBReader ➞ closed
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ ReadableStreamBYOBReader ➞ read
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  14. api ➞ ReadableStreamBYOBReader ➞ releaseLock
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  15. api ➞ ReadableStreamBYOBRequest
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  16. api ➞ ReadableStreamBYOBRequest ➞ respond
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  17. api ➞ ReadableStreamBYOBRequest ➞ respondWithNewView
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  18. api ➞ ReadableStreamBYOBRequest ➞ view
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  19. api ➞ Response ➞ body ➞ readable_byte_stream
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  20. api ➞ WebTransport ➞ byob_readers
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  21. api ➞ WebTransport ➞ createUnidirectionalStream ➞ byob_readers
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ font-size ➞ math
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ math-depth
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ math-depth ➞ auto-add
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines

JAVASCRIPT

  1. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Iterator ➞ concat
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  • Previous report: Monday, 16 February 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.2 (Friday, 13 February 2026) and v7.3.3 (Friday, 20 February 2026)
